needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_sum_subtype (σ : Type*) [Fintype σ] (R : Type*) [CommRing R] (n : ℕ) : esymm σ R n = ∑ t : {s : Finset σ // s.card = n}, ∏ i in t.val, X i
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To rewrite esymm as a sum over subsets of size n. Then we can argue that when n > Fintype.card σ, the set of subsets of size n is empty, so the sum is 0.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty {α : Type*} {s : Finset α} (h : ¬ Nonempty s) : s.card = 0
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To show that the Finset of subsets of size n is empty when n > card σ, so its sum is 0.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.sum_empty {α : Type*} {β : Type*} [AddCommMonoid β] (f : α → β) : (∅ : Finset α).sum f = 0
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To compute the sum over an empty Finset as 0.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.filter_eq_empty_iff {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (p : α → Prop) [DecidablePred p] (s : Finset α) : s.filter p = ∅ ↔ ∀ x ∈ s, ¬ p x
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To show that the set of subsets of size n is empty when n > card σ, because no subset of a set of size card σ can have size n > card σ.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.card_lt_card_of_subset {α : Type*} {s t : Finset α} (hst : s ⊆ t) (hne : s ≠ t) : s.card < t.card
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To argue that if a subset of Finset.univ has size n > card σ, then it cannot be a subset of Finset.univ, leading to a contradiction.
